articles.title: YOUR ONE STOP-SHOP FOR AI SEARCH SOLUTIONS
articles.summary: Algolia generates 1.7 trillion searches a year at 99.999% availability. Our unique end-to-end AI search allows business and development teams to understand users and show them what they need.

articles.title: OPENAI CONSIDERS $2,000 MONTHLY SUBSCRIPTION PRICES FOR NEW LLMS
articles.summary: OpenAI is reportedly considering subscription prices as high as $2,000 per month for the company's upcoming large language models, like Strawberry and Orion.

articles.title: GOOGLE'S AI-POWERED ASK PHOTOS FEATURE BEGINS US ROLLOUT
articles.summary: Google Photos' new AI-powered search feature, "Ask Photos," is rolling out to select users in the U.S., allowing them to search their photos using more complex natural language queries.

articles.title: ALIBABA RELEASES NEW AI MODEL QWEN2-VL THAT CAN ANALYZE VIDEOS MORE THAN 20 MINUTES LONG
articles.summary: Alibaba Cloud has released Qwen2-VL, a new vision-language model with enhanced visual understanding, video comprehension, and multilingual text-image processing. Qwen2-VL shows superior performance against models like Meta's Llama 3.1 and OpenAI's GPT-4o and supports various applications, including real-time video analysis and tech support. The models, available in three sizes (7B, 2B, and soon 72B), are open-source under Apache 2.0 for the smaller variants.

articles.title: SGLANG 0.3
articles.summary: SGLang inference improvements are here in the latest release, with 7x Faster DeepSeek MLA, 1.5x Faster torch.compile, Multi-Image/Video LLaVA-OneVision, and more.

articles.title: OLMO MOE
articles.summary: A great open MoE with best in class performance for 1B activated parameters.

articles.title: ALIGNING STYLE AND TEXT IN IMAGE GENERATION
articles.summary: This paper introduces StyleTokenizer, a method for improving style control in text-to-image generation by aligning style representation with text prompts.

articles.title: 💪 SMALL MODELS, MASSIVE PERFORMANCE WITH OCTOAI
articles.summary: OctoAI empowers engineers to leverage small open-source models like Llama 3.1-8B, outperforming GPT-4o and dramatically reducing costs for enterprise tasks.

articles.title: CORNELL'S APPLIED ML CLASS
articles.summary: Open resources for the Fall 2024 Applied ML class at Cornell.

articles.title: LAMINAR
articles.summary: Open-source observability, analytics, evals, and prompt chains for complex LLM apps.

articles.title: LONG-CONTEXT UNDERSTANDING WITH LONGLLAVA
articles.summary: LongLLaVA is a multimodal model designed for handling long-context tasks like video and high-resolution image understanding.

articles.title: MATURING ENTERPRISE AI INFRASTRUCTURE
articles.summary: Interesting interview with the CEO of BentoML that talks about how to improve your enterprise tooling, ensuring that you are able to scale, but not over-engineering it at the beginning.

articles.title: LLM-BASED EMBEDDING MODELS
articles.summary: This study investigates various designs for LLM-based embedding models, comparing different pooling and attention strategies.

articles.title: OPTICAL CONNECTIVITY DIRECTLY IN THE GPU
articles.summary: GPU interconnect bandwidth is one of the primary bottlenecks in training large models today. Broadcom is working to integrate optical transfer directly into GPUs which would alleviate the issue substantially.

articles.title: YOUTUBE IS MAKING TOOLS TO DETECT FACE AND VOICE DEEP FAKES
articles.summary: YouTube is developing new tools to protect artists and creators from unauthorized use of their likenesses, including AI-generated face and singing voice detection technology, with pilot programs launching early next year.

articles.title: ICON (PRODUCT LAUNCH)
articles.summary: Icon helps brands partner with creators, turn 1 video into 20 videos with AI, and A/B test messaging to find winning ads.

articles.title: GOOGLE IS WORKING ON AI THAT CAN HEAR SIGNS OF SICKNESS
articles.summary: Google is using AI models trained on 300 million audio samples to detect early signs of diseases like tuberculosis.
